headlines.h: Markets React To: I should have expected this since the day he started guarding his crib.
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-03-22)
